description: Multi-turn lifecycle: create -> test-code -> update -> disable -> enable -> delete (covers `neomind transform test-code` + `update` + `enable/disable` + `delete`; previously only create/list had coverage).

turns.user: Create a global transform: name c2f, code 'return input * 1.8 + 32'.
Test it via test-code with input 25 to see the output.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind transform create --name c2f --scope global --code 'return input * 1.8 + 32'`, parses id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind transform test-code --code 'return input * 1.8 + 32' --input 25` (or tests against the id)
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind transform update <id> --code 'return input * 1.8 + 32 + 0.5'`
expectations.overall: Last five turns must reuse the id parsed from turn 1
